> A modern and visually appealing print house business seeking a professional landing page. The brand aims to convey creativity, quality, and professionalism in the printing industry, with a contemporary and attractive aesthetic.

## How to Contact Us

- Email: 0747016464d@gmail.com
- Phone: 074-7016464
- Phone (tel): tel:0747016464
- Address: יונתן בן עוזיאל 17, אלעד, ישראל, 4082017, ישראל

### Contact form
- URL: https://dfus-hadar.zappy5.app
- Endpoint: https://dfus-hadar.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About דפוס הדר
A modern and visually appealing print house business seeking a professional landing page. The brand aims to convey creativity, quality, and professionalism in the printing industry, with a contemporary and attractive aesthetic.

## Target Audience
- בעלי עסקים קטנים
- מוסדות חינוך
- בעלי עסקים גדולים
- אנשים פרטיים

## Industry
הדפסה ודפוס
